questions.question: Explain HTML Core Principles Part 12A and its primary use case in HTML.
questions.answer: HTML Core Principles Part 12A provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with HTML Core Principles Part 12A?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the HTML runtime optimize HTML Core Principles Part 12A under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
